mapper.insert: insert into tb_goods set code = #{code}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, checkup_1 = #{checkup1}, checkup_2 = #{checkup2}, checkup_3 = #{checkup3}, checkup_4 = #{checkup4}, sales_volume = 0, image = #{image}, initial_price = #{initialPrice}, current_price = #{currentPrice}, type = #{type}, # 可为空 part_id = #{partId}, # 可为空 rule_id = #{ruleId}, status = false, # 可为空 tag = #{tag}, md5 = #{md5}
mapper.select: select id, code, title, description, checkup_1, checkup_2, checkup_3, checkup_4, checkup, image, initial_price, current_price, type, tag, part_id, rule_id from tb_goods where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tb_goods set title = #{title}, code = #{code}, description = #{description}, checkup_1 = #{checkup1}, checkup_2 = #{checkup2}, checkup_3 = #{checkup3}, checkup_4 = #{checkup4}, image = #{image}, initial_price = #{initialPrice}, current_price = #{currentPrice}, type = #{type}, tag = #{tag}, part_id = #{partId}, rule_id = #{ruleId}, md5 = #{md5} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select image from tb_goods where id in
#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from tb_goods where status = false and sales_volume = 0 and id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select g.code, g.title, g.description, g.image as images, g.initial_price as initialPrice, g.current_price as currentPrice, r.name as ruleName, g.type, g.tag as tags, g.checkup_1, IFNULL(JSON_LENGTH(g.checkup_1), 0) as count_1, g.checkup_2, IFNULL(JSON_LENGTH(g.checkup_2), 0) as count_2, g.checkup_3, IFNULL(JSON_LENGTH(g.checkup_3), 0) as count_3, g.checkup_4, IFNULL(JSON_LENGTH(g.checkup_4), 0) as count_4 from tb_goods g left join tb_rule r on g.rule_id = r.id where g.id = #{id}
and g.status = #{status}

select.foreach: ( SELECT id, code, title, description, image, initial_price AS initialPrice, current_price AS currentPrice, sales_volume AS salesVolume, part_id FROM tb_goods WHERE status = 1 AND part_id = #{pid} ORDER BY sales_volume DESC, id DESC LIMIT 4 )

mapper.select:
select id, code, title, description, image, initial_price as initialPrice, current_price as currentPrice, sales_volume as salesVolume, part_id from tb_goods where status = 1
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT("%",#{request.keyword},"%") OR code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{request.keyword},"%") )
AND part_id = #{request.partId}
AND type = #{request.type}
AND JSON_CONTAINS (tag, CONCAT('"',#{request.sex},'"'))
AND current_price >= 0 AND current_price < 100
AND current_price >= 100 AND current_price < 500
AND current_price >= 500 AND current_price < 1000
AND current_price >= 1000
ORDER BY id DESC
ORDER BY sales_volume DESC
ORDER BY currentPrice ASC
ORDER BY currentPrice DESC
# 默认分支，当所有都为 false 时触发 ORDER BY sales_volume DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{request.length}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_goods WHERE `status` = 1
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT("%",#{request.keyword},"%") OR code LIKE CONCAT("%",#{request.keyword},"%") )
AND type = #{request.keyword}
and part_id = #{request.partId}
AND JSON_CONTAINS (tag, CONCAT('"',#{request.sex},'"'))
AND current_price >= 0 AND current_price < 100
AND current_price >= 100 AND current_price < 500
AND current_price >= 500 AND current_price < 1000
AND current_price >= 1000

SELECT g.`code`, g.title, g.description, g.image, CAST(g.initial_price AS CHAR) AS initialPrice, CAST(g.current_price AS CHAR) AS currentPrice, r.name AS ruleName, r.rule, g.type, g.tag, g.checkup_1, g.checkup_2, g.checkup_3, g.checkup_4, g.checkup, g.`md5` FROM tb_goods g LEFT JOIN tb_rule r ON g.rule_id = r.id WHERE g.id = #{id}
